name: Balsamic Vinegar Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 pound boneless, skinless chicken breasts, sliced into 1/2-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large non-stick skillet over medium heat.
2. Cook onion until tender, stirring occasionally.
3. Add garlic and chicken to the skillet; cook until chicken is golden brown.
4. Stir in balsamic vinegar and let simmer for 1 minute.
5. Stir in honey and Dijon mustard; coat the mixture evenly.
6. Add pine nuts and season with salt and pepper.
7. Toss mixed greens with the chicken mixture.
8. Top with fresh grated Parmesan cheese before serving.
Yield: 2 servings
